title: fix(deps): update module github.com/containers/buildah to v1.32.2
body:

This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Type | Update | Change |
|---|---|---|---|
| [github.com/containers/buildah](https://togithub.com/containers/buildah) | require | patch | `v1.32.1-0.20231026190652-11e3b2132761` -> `v1.32.2` |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>containers/buildah (github.com/containers/buildah)</summary>

### [`v1.32.2`](https://togithub.com/containers/buildah/releases/tag/v1.32.2)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/containers/buildah/compare/v1.32.1...v1.32.2)

#### What's Changed

-   Mask /sys/devices/virtual/powercap by default by [@​mheon](https://togithub.com/mheon) in [https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/5113](https://togithub.com/containers/buildah/pull/5113)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/containers/buildah/compare/v1.32.1...v1.32.2

</details>

### Renovate Ignore Notification

Because you closed this PR without merging, Renovate will ignore this update (`v1.32.2`). You will get a PR once a newer version is released. To ignore this dependency forever, add it to the `ignoreDeps` array of your Renovate config.
